title: B4/B8 R162 VF2 score-combination trace protocol

retained_per_call_fields: operation order and ErrorMap accumulation bits
score event kind, operand bits, result/order code, and source labels
source-order leaf score bits for compensated and exact-binary64 shadows
candidate mapping labels, returned score bits, and stop reason
replay payload hash and elapsed time

shadow_definitions.source_f64: the Rust TraceScore left-to-right binary64 combine path
shadow_definitions.compensated_fsum: math.fsum over the retained binary64 leaf values in source leaf order
shadow_definitions.exact_binary64_leaf_sum: exact rational sum of the retained binary64 leaf values; this is an arithmetic shadow, not an exact real-valued Qiskit score

claim_boundary.what_is_supported: one source- and binary-bound score-combination trace over the frozen R157 input, with arithmetic shadows
claim_boundary.what_is_not_supported: a confirmed Qiskit bug, a numerical remedy, general compiler determinism, hardware relevance, route advantage, quantum advantage, BQP separation, solved B4/B8/B10, or new credit

requirements.label: exact source commit, input, target, patch, patched source, binary, and build manifest are hash-bound
the release build emits the score-trace and retained ErrorMap trace APIs
only an unrelated three-qubit toy is used before frozen-input execution
native, ascending, and descending accumulation profiles are frozen
three processes and 256 post-registration calls are fixed
partial combines, strict comparisons, candidates, leaf bits, and hashes are retained
compensated and exact-binary64 shadow definitions are fixed before execution
all mapping and no-solution outcomes remain admissible before execution
zero simulations, shots, sampling, candidate selection, and route changes are fixed
forbidden bug, hardware, advantage, BQP, solved-frontier, and credit claims remain false
